author: BREND+brendbot
desc: Residential building science: physics, enclosure, airflow, HVAC, health, loads, materials, standards. Compressed from v2.0: stripped pure training-data defs, abbreviated field keys, tabular facts, all numerical values preserved.

src_map.BPI2400: ANSI/BPI-2400-S-2015 Qualification of Energy Savings Predictions
src_map.ASHRAE62.2: ASHRAE 62.2 Ventilation and Acceptable IAQ in Residential Buildings
src_map.ASHRAE55: ASHRAE 55 Thermal Environmental Conditions for Human Occupancy

defs.d: 4 variables: air_temp + MRT + RH + air_speed
continuous; tested at CFM50
material per climate zone + drying potential; prevents interstitial condensation
material or gap interrupting capillary wicking
uncontrolled outdoor air ingress via unintentional openings
uncontrolled conditioned air egress
balanced mech vent; heat exchange exhaust<>supply
balanced mech vent; heat + moisture exchange
required air supply for complete combustion; sizing per IRC2021.G2407
fraction of incident solar radiation admitted through window
indoor/outdoor temp basis for load calcs by climate zone; see IRC2021.TableR301.2(1)
grains/hr*ft2*inHg; governs assembly drying capacity
annual heat output / annual fuel energy input
seasonal cooling BTU / electrical Wh
useful energy delivered / total energy consumed (water heater)
heat pump heating efficiency rating
airflow (CFM) to maintain 50Pa dP across envelope; blower door
natural ACH under normal pressure; derived from ACH50/N-factor
colorless/odorless; toxic at low concentration; incomplete combustion byproduct
radioactive; uranium decay in soil; accumulates low areas; primary indoor carcinogen
flue gas flow reversal; combustion products enter living space

enclosure.d: bulk water > air > vapor > thermal; order fixed
CI outperforms equal-R cavity; eliminates thermal bridging through framing
class I/II/III per climate zone and drying direction (in/out/both)
required behind cladding for bulk water management
batts(FG/MW), rigid(XPS/EPS/polyiso), loose-fill(cellulose/FG), spray foam(open/closed), natural fiber
framing conducts faster than adjacent insul; CI reduces; advanced framing reduces framing fraction

airflow.d: buoyancy-driven; warm exits high, cool enters low; magnitude proportional to height*dT
positive windward, negative leeward; drives infiltration/exfiltration
HRV/ERV: neutral pressure + max IAQ control + heat recovery
outside conditioned space: wastes conditioned air, depressurizes, backdraft risk
unconfined space / confined with openings / direct duct exterior; size per IRC2021.G2407

hvac_heat.d: atmospheric ~60% AFUE -> induced draft -> condensing >95% AFUE
duct/pipe/steam trap losses reduce delivered eff below equipment eff
CO increases: restricted combair, cracked HX, blocked flue, improper burner

hvac_cool.d: oversized -> short-cycle -> inadequate dehumidification; Manual J required
SEER=seasonal avg; EER=single-point 95F outdoor; both matter
ductless eliminates duct losses; inverter-driven modulates to match load
natural vent, ceiling fans, radiant barrier, exterior shading, high-albedo roof

hvac_dhw.d: storage tank: continuous loss proportional to dT(stored water, surrounding air)
60-75% less energy than electric resistance; best option all-electric
eliminates standby loss; requires high gas/elec capacity; sizing critical

health_iaq.d: IRC2021.R315; near sleeping areas; action at 70ppm sustained
SSD primary method; target <4 pCi/L; test before+after
requires >70% RH sustained at surface; control: air seal + vent + vapor mgmt
sources: adhesives, paints, flooring, furnishings, cleaners; mitigation: source reduction + dilution vent

fenestration.d: overall heat transfer coeff; BTU/hr*ft2*F or W/m2K; lower=better
high SHGC: heating climate (passive solar gains); low SHGC: cooling climate
fraction visible light transmitted; higher=more daylight
CFM/ft frame perimeter @ 0.3in WG; max 0.3 CFM/ft per IRC2021

standards.d: base residential code; energy in Chapter N
Ventilation and IAQ in Residential Buildings
min energy efficiency requirements by climate zone

thms.d: oversized cooling: capacity>load -> short-cycle -> runtime too brief for dehumidification -> latent overshoot
indoor pressure < appliance spillage point -> flue gas reversal -> CO in living space

prov.basis: Compressed from v2.0. Stripped: pure training-data physics defs (1LAW, 2LAW, ENERGY, COND, CONV, RAD, HYGRO, EMITT, THERMASS). Abbreviated field keys (t/d/s/f/n). Tabular facts. All numerical values preserved. hash: recompute required.
